data.title: Thoropass Releases 2026 State of Audit And Compliance Report: AI Emerges as the Top Compliance and Audit Risk
data.description: In New York, Thoropass unveiled its 2026 State of Audit and Compliance Report, indicating a surge in AI adoption as the leading source of IT security compliance risk. Nearly 70% of security and compliance leaders acknowledge that AI adoption is surpassing their current security and compliance safeguards, highlighting an expanding governance void. The report, derived from a survey encompassing over 500 security, IT, and compliance experts, demonstrates that compliance initiatives are...

data.title: State and Local Governments Turn to Box to Modernize Workflows with Secure AI
data.description: In California, Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) showcased at its State and Local Government Virtual Summit how state and local governments are utilizing its Intelligent Content Management platform. The event emphasized the impact of secure, AI-powered content on operations. The City and County of Denver shared their experience using Box as an AI-powered content management system to enhance case workflows. This transformation has led to quicker, more secure, and efficient processes.

data.title: Lutzie 43 Foundation Partners with the Governor's Office of Highway Safety to Bring Safe Driving Summit to Two Oconee County High Schools
data.description: A Safe Driving Summit will take place at Oconee County High School in Atlanta on March 25, 2026. Students will receive training on road safety to prevent distracted, impaired, and unsafe driving. The event is organized by the Lutzie 43 Foundation and the Governor's Office of Highway Safety. This initiative aims to equip students with essential lifesaving skills.

data.title: LangChain introduces shareable AI skills for LangSmith Fleet; Teams can now codify company knowledge for tasks across workspaces.
data.description: The LangSmith Fleet has launched a new feature that allows teams to develop and distribute reusable AI agent skills. This initiative aims to capture company insights and expertise for specific functions within various workspaces. The AI agent skills can be easily shared among team members, promoting efficiency and consistency in task execution.

data.title: FanDuel Sportsbook Unveils New MLB Experience, Cementing Its Position as the "Home of the Home Run"
data.description: FanDuel has introduced new features for the upcoming MLB season, including the Daily Dinger Free-to-Play game, home run betting markets, and improved player tools. The company made this announcement on March 25, 2026, in New York. FanDuel, recognized as a leading online gaming company in North America, aims to enhance the MLB experience for its customers. The upgrades are part of their efforts to provide a more engaging platform, with a focus on exciting gameplay and betting opportunities.

data.title: Permuta Pushes Back on AI Coding Hype: "You Can't Prompt Your Way Out of Enterprise Complexity"
data.description: Today, a new white paper titled "You Can't Prompt Your Way Out of Enterprise Complexity" was launched by Permuta Technologies in Washington on March 25, 2026. The paper challenges assertions that AI-driven coding tools could entirely supplant conventional software engineering practices in extensive corporate settings. The release seeks to debunk these claims and provide insights counter to this narrative, emphasizing the enduring importance of manual coding processes.

data.title: BTC struggles below $72K due to weak demand indicators: investor distribution, low whale activity, and declining network growth.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin continues to struggle to rise above $72,000, with concerns arising from investor distribution, minimal whale activity, and a decrease in network growth. These factors are contributing to uncertainty regarding the short-term future of BTC.

data.title: Argentina is preventing Polymarket's progress despite global growth due to gambling laws, user protection, and regulatory challenges.
data.description: Argentina's decision to block Polymarket despite its global expansion can be attributed to its stringent gambling laws and concerns about user protection. The country is facing regulatory pressure when it comes to prediction markets, leading to the exclusion of platforms like Polymarket. The move comes as a surprise given Polymarket's impressive growth numbers, which have seen it gain traction internationally. However, Argentina's prioritization of enforcing gambling regulations and safeguarding users has taken precedence over allowing the platform to operate within its borders. This decision showcases the government's commitment to upholding strict regulations in the face of the growing popularity of prediction markets.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Kane County Economic Development Corporation Appoints Michael Cassa as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: The Kane County Economic Development Corporation (KCEDC) has appointed Michael Cassa as the new Chief Executive Officer to lead the countywide strategies. Cassa, a seasoned economic development leader, will focus on strengthening site readiness and expanding investments and partnerships across Kane County's 29 municipalities. This move comes after multiple revisions and the updated release aims to bring a fresh approach to economic development in the region.
